name: Parameter inference tolerates a renamed on-screen control label (§5.5 label-rename axis, offline, no LLM)
description: Second perturbed-UI-axis regression scenario for §5.5's remaining checklist item (docs/new/csimple-agent-prompt.md §5.5: 'Add at least one perturbed-UI scenario per generalization axis — position shift, label rename, timing variance'). Exercises POST /api/skill/infer-params end-to-end with two demonstrations of the SAME task where a uia_invoke target's visible `name` (its on-screen label) changed between recordings — e.g. a button relabeled from 'Submit' to 'Submit Now' — while its structural `automationId` stayed identical. Asserts recorder/infer-params.js's designed behavior: a renamed label is treated as a semantically-varying value and IS promoted to ${param.name} (so a relabeled control doesn't hard-fail generalization), while the structurally-stable automationId that did NOT vary is correctly left untouched as a literal, and the typed text (also varying) is still promoted alongside it.
